assertion_results.text: Sibling check correctly classifies TC-8001 as a different-stream companion (stream [rhtpa-2.2] vs current issue's [rhtpa-2.1]), not a same-stream duplicate (Step 4)
assertion_results.evidence: sibling-check.md lines 23-27: 'TC-8001 has stream suffix [rhtpa-2.2], while TC-8006 has stream suffix [rhtpa-2.1]. These are different streams (2.2.x vs 2.1.x). Result: Not a same-stream duplicate. TC-8001 is a different-stream companion.'

assertion_results.text: Step 4.2 checks the current issue's existing issuelinks before attempting to create a 'Related' link to TC-8001 (§1.58)
assertion_results.evidence: sibling-check.md lines 35-46: Explicitly describes checking the current issue's issuelinks array (already fetched in Step 1) for an existing link where type.name is 'Related' and inwardIssue.key or outwardIssue.key matches TC-8001, then displays the existing issuelinks table showing link ID 1990401.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.2 detects the pre-existing 'Related' link to TC-8001 and skips link creation — does NOT call jira.create_link (§1.58)
assertion_results.evidence: sibling-check.md lines 47-55: 'A matching Related link to TC-8001 already exists (link ID 1990401, outward direction). Action: SKIP link creation. ... No jira.create_link call is made. The existing link satisfies the cross-stream coordination requirement.'

assertion_results.text: The output includes a log message indicating the link was skipped because it already exists (e.g., 'Related link to TC-8001 already exists — skipping')
assertion_results.evidence: sibling-check.md line 52: '"Related link to TC-8001 already exists -- skipping"' — matches the required log message pattern.

assertion_results.text: The sibling landscape table is still presented to the engineer despite the link already existing — the idempotent check only affects link creation, not the sibling summary
assertion_results.evidence: sibling-check.md lines 66-77: The sibling landscape table is presented showing TC-8001 (stream 2.2.x) and TC-8006 (stream 2.1.x). triage-outcome.md lines 62-77: 'Even though the link already existed and creation was skipped, the sibling landscape table is still presented to the engineer for situational awareness.'
